title: scutellaria daghestanica
intro: Scutellaria daghestanica, also known as Dagestan skullcap or Daghestan scutellaria, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as possessing anti-cancer and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria daghestanica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
